description: Partnership agreement. Location: Cairo. Dated: 1 Av 5579 AM = 23 July 1819 CE. Between Gedalya Mujnājī and Shabbetay Vidal. The partnership is to begin immediately and to last for a period of 6 months. They are in the sarraflık trade (בעסק הצירפליק). Signed by the scribe Yaʿaqov ha-Kohen.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעברית. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
